name: SkyrimTogether Reborn
about: Multiplayer mod for Skyrim SE. Track bugs across quests, NPCs, and network sync. Report crashes, desync events, and quest state mismatches.

name: Stardew Expanded
about: Massive expansion mod adding new areas, characters, and events to Stardew Valley. Submit bugs related to new content, save compatibility, or event triggers.

name: Minecraft Origins+
about: Adds 30+ new origin classes to Fabric Minecraft. Report balance issues, broken abilities, or compatibility problems with other mods.

name: Elden Ring Spirit Ash Overhaul
about: Complete rework of all spirit ash summons â€” new AI, scaling tweaks, and visual effects. Public bug tracker for ash behavior, summoning failures, and FP cost errors.

name: Factorio Space Age Extended
about: Extends the Space Age DLC with additional planets, research chains, and logistic challenges. Report issues with planet generation, recipe conflicts, or tech tree ordering.

name: Terraria Calamity Progression
about: Rebalances Calamity progression order and boss difficulty scaling. Track boss AI bugs, weapon balance issues, and biome generation failures.

name: Cyberpunk StreetModder
about: Overhauls Night City's street AI, gang territory systems, and ambient events. Report NPC pathing bugs, territory overlap glitches, and event scripting errors.

name: RimWorld Ideology Plus
about: Expands ideology system with 40+ new precepts, rituals, and meme combinations. Private tracker for balance testing. Submit broken ritual chains or precept conflicts.

name: Hollow Knight Godmaster Extended
about: Adds 20 new pantheon bosses and a randomizer mode for Godmaster. Track boss pattern bugs, HP scaling issues, and Hall of Gods unlock failures.

name: No Man's Sky Procedural+
about: Enhances planetary generation with new biome types, weather systems, and creature behaviors. Report terrain generation artifacts, weather desync, or creature AI failures.

name: Valheim Ashlands Rework
about: Reworks the Ashlands biome with new enemy types, resource nodes, and boss encounter design. Report enemy spawn issues, resource balance, or boss mechanic bugs.

name: Path of Exile BuildSync
about: In-game build sharing and comparison tool for Path of Exile 2. Track import failures, stat calculation errors, and passive tree rendering bugs.

name: Baldur's Gate 3 Party Overhaul
about: Allows up to 8 party members with expanded companion AI and tactical options. Track companion pathing failures, dialogue trigger issues, and combat AI misbehavior.

name: Dark Souls 3 PvP Balance
about: Rebalances weapons, spells, and stamina for competitive PvP. Report broken hit registration, roll catch issues, or stamina calculation bugs after patches.

name: Fallout 4 Sim Settlements 3
about: Third generation settlement building overhaul with automated NPC assignment and plot progression. Track settler AI failures, plot upgrade bugs, and city plan conflicts.
